escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext command fails twice on the same item after one Composer fix attempt
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or pickup/delivery CF eligibility logic (run Sonnet 4.6 security review Task before push)
item tier is T2+ and changes auth, Firestore writes, or transaction/idempotency behavior
acceptance criteria cannot be met without schema or rules change not listed in item scope — mark blocked, do not widen scope
executionProtocol.instructions: Follow PROJECT_STATUS/AWAY_BUILD_PROTOCOL.md. After each item: npm run away:ship -- --id <id> --note "..." then npm run away:validate. No gh-pages deploy; no firebase deploy; docs/scripts/rules only unless item scope says otherwise.

queue.title: Phase 6 slice 3: Gmail reply sync / watch (spec only)
queue.scope: Gmail push/watch + inbound reply thread sync to Vendor Communications drawer. SPEC ONLY — do not implement until Dan queues and approves. Not blocked by ESL/shop map.
queue.acceptance: Written spec only: watch setup, inbound reply matching, drawer thread display, security review checklist. No CF/UI implementation in this item.

queue.title: Mini-librarian phase 3: away:ship + validate sync project_state Immediate Next
queue.scope: Extend away:ship (and away:validate auto-sync if needed) so docs/project_state.md ## Immediate Next Steps item #1 stays in sync with queue head (same rule as CURRENT_STATE + NEXT.md). Fix stale away-076 line in project_state.md as part of this item. Add helper in away-memory-lib.mjs; no product code. CONSTRAINTS: no product UI, Firebase, CF, Firestore rules, readiness, pickup, vendor, or Gmail behavior changes; no gh-pages or firebase deploy; docs/scripts/rules only.
queue.acceptance: away:ship updates project_state.md Immediate Next Steps #1 to next queued id+title (or post-queue fallback when queue empty); away:validate passes with queue head === project_state #1 === CURRENT_STATE immediate next; stale away-076 reference removed from project_state.md.

queue.title: Mini-librarian phase 3: task-trigger gotcha map + orchestrator steps 6-8 → CLI
queue.scope: Add task-trigger entries to PROJECT_STATUS/context-index.json mapping composer-orchestrator session-start steps 6-8 (MODEL_DOSSIER index/§ by tag, agent-lessons, USER_SCOPE_REJECTIONS) to npm run context:lookup -- --concern "…" slices or dossier:slice tags. Update MEMORY.md and/or composer-orchestrator.mdc to prefer CLI lookup over full-file reads for those triggers. No product code. CONSTRAINTS: no product UI, Firebase, CF, Firestore rules, readiness, pickup, vendor, or Gmail behavior changes; no gh-pages or firebase deploy; docs/scripts/rules only.
queue.acceptance: context-index.json has ≥3 taskTrigger rows (dossier-index, agent-lessons, scope-rejections or equivalent); npm run context:lookup -- --concern "agent lessons" (or documented alias) returns dossier slice not full MODEL_DOSSIER.md; orchestrator/MEMORY references CLI path for steps 6-8; npm run away:validate passes.

queue.title: Mini-librarian phase 3: context:packet + away:next --packet
queue.scope: Add scripts/context-packet.mjs and npm run context:packet -- --tags <tag1,tag2> — Context Packet Builder lite: hot tier pointers + dossier § slices + optional away:next --minimal. Extend away-next.mjs with --packet flag merging queue brief + tag-derived § slices + blocker one-liner from CURRENT_STATE. Register scripts in package.json. No product code. CONSTRAINTS: no product UI, Firebase, CF, Firestore rules, readiness, pickup, vendor, or Gmail behavior changes; no gh-pages or firebase deploy; docs/scripts/rules only.
queue.acceptance: npm run context:packet -- --tags agent-lessons emits JSON or markdown packet with sliced § excerpts (not full dossier); npm run away:next -- --packet includes merged packet when queue non-empty; npm run build passes; npm run away:validate passes.

queue.title: Mini-librarian phase 3: rotate cold dossier § to archives (optional)
queue.scope: OPTIONAL — skip if prior items consumed batch time. Move outcome log + session confidence tables from PROJECT_STATUS/MODEL_DOSSIER.md to PROJECT_STATUS/archives/dossier-notes.md; keep index + active § in main dossier; update dossier-index.json line ranges if needed; away:validate dossier-index drift checks still pass. No product code. CONSTRAINTS: no product UI, Firebase, CF, Firestore rules, readiness, pickup, vendor, or Gmail behavior changes; no gh-pages or firebase deploy; docs/scripts/rules only.
queue.acceptance: MODEL_DOSSIER.md trimmed (cold tables in archives/dossier-notes.md); npm run dossier:slice -- --tag agent-lessons still works; dossier-index.json ranges valid; npm run away:validate passes with no new dossier-index errors.
